name: fluent
description: Fluent gives ChatGPT and Codex shared Meals, Style, and budget context for practical everyday decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Shared Meals, Style, and budget context.
interface.longDescription: Fluent connects ChatGPT and Codex to the same saved Meals, Style, and budget context, with explicit approval for changes.
defaultPrompt: Plan next week around my schedule and turn it into a grocery list I can actually shop from.
Tell me if this clothing purchase is actually right for my wardrobe or just attractive in isolation.
